text:
The VMware Cloud CLI. This is the command line interface 
to VMware's Application Platform.

WWW: https://github.com/cloudfoundry/vmc

Please note that this port depends on rubygem-terminal-table, rubygem-rubyzip2,
and should be handled after pr 156630 156631.
